object.name: editEphemeralMessageCaption
object.description: Use this method to edit the caption of an ephemeral message. Note that it is not guaranteed that the user will receive the message edit event, especially if they are offline. On success, True is returned.
object.html_description: Use this method to edit the caption of an ephemeral message. Note that it is not guaranteed that the user will receive the message edit event, especially if they are offline. On success, True is returned.
object.rst_description: Use this method to edit the caption of an ephemeral message. Note that it is not guaranteed that the user will receive the message edit event, especially if they are offline. On success, :code:`True` is returned.

annotations.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target supergroup in the format @username

annotations.rst_description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target supergroup in the format :code:`@username`
annotations.name: chat_id

annotations.description: Identifier of the user who received the message
annotations.html_description: Identifier of the user who received the message
annotations.rst_description: Identifier of the user who received the message

annotations.description: Identifier of the ephemeral message to edit
annotations.html_description: Identifier of the ephemeral message to edit
annotations.rst_description: Identifier of the ephemeral message to edit

annotations.description: New caption of the message, 0-1024 characters after entities parsing

annotations.rst_description: New caption of the message, 0-1024 characters after entities parsing

annotations.description: Mode for parsing entities in the message caption. See formatting options for more details.
annotations.html_description: Mode for parsing entities in the message caption. See formatting options for more details.
annotations.rst_description: Mode for parsing entities in the message caption. See `formatting options <https://core.telegram.org/bots/api#formatting-options>`_ for more details.

annotations.description: A JSON-serialized list of special entities that appear in the caption, which can be specified instead of parse_mode

annotations.rst_description: A JSON-serialized list of special entities that appear in the caption, which can be specified instead of *parse_mode*
annotations.name: caption_entities
